purpose: Unseen paired cases for measuring whether the payload-only activation rule prevents repeated envelope-bias defects in Codex and Hermes.
prior_case_exclusion: No task text is copied from benchmarks/runtime_activation/cases.json. Historical RA01-RA07 outputs are retrospective evidence only.

cases.task: Report the current Git branch name without changing any files.
Fix one known punctuation mark in a single Markdown sentence.
Investigate an intermittent CI failure across logs and code, identify the root cause, implement the fix, and prove it with tests.
Review a release candidate whose summary conflicts with raw test artifacts and decide whether it can ship.
Design and execute a benchmark comparing two agent-routing strategies, including preregistration and evidence publication.
Coordinate several agents through a security-sensitive migration while the repository rollback marker is present.
